name: Le Mars Willow Creek Pickleball & Tennis Facility
description: Come play pickleball at Le Mars Willow Creek Pickleball & Tennis Facility in Le Mars, IA! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include lights and water.

name: YMCA Le Mars
description: YMCA Le Mars is a place to play pickleball in Le Mars, IA. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. You can reserve the courts. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights. A membership is required to play.
